---
name: New telephony platform adapter
about: Add voice governance support for a new telephony platform
labels: enhancement, new-platform-adapter
---

**Platform name and SDK version**
<!-- e.g., Amazon Connect SDK v3, Vonage Voice API v2 -->

**Call event model**
<!-- How does this platform deliver call start/end/transcript events? Webhook? SDK callback? -->

**TCPA consent integration point**
<!-- Where in the call flow can consent be checked before AI responds? -->

**Transcript access**
<!-- Does this platform provide real-time transcripts or post-call? ASR confidence scores? -->

**I am willing to contribute this adapter**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, requesting from maintainers
